query: Do Juno observations show electron density depletions over Jupiter's auroral zones, and if so how large are they?

row.paper: Sulaiman, A.H., et al., 2022. Jupiter's low-altitude auroral zones: Fields, particles, plasma waves, and density depletions. JGR Space Physics, 127(8), e2022JA030334. DOI:10.1029/2022JA030334
row.query: Do Juno observations show electron density depletions over Jupiter's auroral zones, and if so how large are they?

tool_input.summary: PDS contains Juno electron density measurements suitable for testing for auroral-zone density depletions ("cavities"). The key product is the PDS4 Juno/WAVES derived electron-density bundle; supporting PDS3 WAVES EDR/CDR and JADE moments datasets can be used to cross-check plasma density and context. Use Juno SPICE kernels to locate when the spacecraft is magnetically connected to Jupiter’s auroral zones, then quantify depletion depth as a ratio or difference versus adjacent non-auroral intervals.

candidates.title: Juno Waves Electron Densities from Characteristic Plasma Wave Frequencies
candidates.reasoning: Direct derived electron density time series from Juno/WAVES (from characteristic plasma wave frequencies such as Fpe/Fuh/Flhr/Fce). This is the primary dataset to look for electron-density depletions during auroral crossings.

candidates.title: JNO E J SS WAV 2 EDR V1.0
candidates.reasoning: Raw/EDR Juno/WAVES data volume. Useful if you want to independently derive density from plasma wave signatures or verify derived density features during auroral intervals.

candidates.title: JNO E J SS WAV 3 CDR BSTFULL V2.0
candidates.reasoning: Calibrated Juno/WAVES burst/full-resolution CDR volume—helpful for resolving fine-scale density cavity structure near auroral regions.

candidates.title: JNO E J SS WAV 3 CDR SRVFULL V2.0
candidates.reasoning: Calibrated Juno/WAVES survey CDR volume—useful for continuous context and longer-timescale density depletion identification.

candidates.title: JNO J JAD 5 MOMENTS V1.0
candidates.reasoning: Juno/JADE plasma moments volume; can provide particle-based density estimates to compare with WAVES-derived electron densities in/near auroral regions.

candidates.title: JUNO SPICE FILES
candidates.reasoning: SPICE kernels for Juno geometry and ancillary data; needed to map observations to magnetic footprint/auroral-zone connection and to select intervals over the auroral zones for depletion-size calculations.

tool_calls.tool_output: Final result processed.

parts.content:
You are a dataset-discovery assistant for the NASA PDS catalog (atm, geo, img, naif, ppi, rms, sbn nodes, ~12k datasets).

Tools are provided via MCP. You MUST call at least one search tool before returning results.

Interpret the user's science question, infer the relevant mission(s) and instrument(s), then search using mission/instrument keywords — not raw science terms alone. Return both PDS4 and PDS3 versions when available. Only return candidates you've seen in tool results — never invent IDs. Stay under ~10 tool calls. If nothing matches, return an empty list.
Do Juno observations show electron density depletions over Jupiter's auroral zones, and if so how large are they?

datasets.title: Juno Waves Electron Densities from Characteristic Plasma Wave Frequencies
Voyager 1 PWS Electric Waveforms Data Collection
Juno Waves Electron Densities from Characteristic Plasma Wave Frequencies
Voyager 1 PWS Electric Waveforms Data Collection
Juno Waves Electron Densities from Characteristic Plasma Wave Frequencies

dataset.title: Juno Waves Electron Densities from Characteristic Plasma Wave Frequencies
dataset.description: This bundle contains electron density datasets from Waves team members throughout the Juno Mission. Measurements include, but are not limited to, Fpe, Flhr, Fuh, Fce.

datasets.title: Juno Waves Electron Densities from Characteristic Plasma Wave Frequencies

datasets.title: JUNO SPICE FILES

parts.args: {"summary":"PDS contains Juno electron density measurements suitable for testing for auroral-zone density depletions (\"cavities\"). The key product is the PDS4 Juno/WAVES derived electron-density bundle; supporting PDS3 WAVES EDR/CDR and JADE moments datasets can be used to cross-check plasma density and context. Use Juno SPICE kernels to locate when the spacecraft is magnetically connected to Jupiter’s auroral zones, then quantify depletion depth as a ratio or difference versus adjacent non-auroral intervals.","candidates":[{"dataset_id":"urn:nasa:pds:juno_waves_electron-density::1.0","title":"Juno Waves Electron Densities from Characteristic Plasma Wave Frequencies","mission":"Juno","node":"ppi","pds_version":"PDS4","reasoning":"Direct derived electron density time series from Juno/WAVES (from characteristic plasma wave frequencies such as Fpe/Fuh/Flhr/Fce). This is the primary dataset to look for electron-density depletions during auroral crossings."},{"dataset_id":"JNO-E_J_SS-WAV-2-EDR-V1.0","title":"JNO E J SS WAV 2 EDR V1.0","mission":"Juno","node":"ppi","pds_version":"PDS3","reasoning":"Raw/EDR Juno/WAVES data volume. Useful if you want to independently derive density from plasma wave signatures or verify derived density features during auroral intervals."},{"dataset_id":"JNO-E_J_SS-WAV-3-CDR-BSTFULL-V2.0","title":"JNO E J SS WAV 3 CDR BSTFULL V2.0","mission":"Juno","node":"ppi","pds_version":"PDS3","reasoning":"Calibrated Juno/WAVES burst/full-resolution CDR volume—helpful for resolving fine-scale density cavity structure near auroral regions."},{"dataset_id":"JNO-E_J_SS-WAV-3-CDR-SRVFULL-V2.0","title":"JNO E J SS WAV 3 CDR SRVFULL V2.0","mission":"Juno","node":"ppi","pds_version":"PDS3","reasoning":"Calibrated Juno/WAVES survey CDR volume—useful for continuous context and longer-timescale density depletion identification."},{"dataset_id":"JNO-J-JAD-5-MOMENTS-V1.0","title":"JNO J JAD 5 MOMENTS V1.0","mission":"Juno","node":"ppi","pds_version":"PDS3","reasoning":"Juno/JADE plasma moments volume; can provide particle-based density estimates to compare with WAVES-derived electron densities in/near auroral regions."},{"dataset_id":"JNO-J/E/SS-SPICE-6-V1.0","title":"JUNO SPICE FILES","mission":"Juno","node":"naif","pds_version":"PDS3","reasoning":"SPICE kernels for Juno geometry and ancillary data; needed to map observations to magnetic footprint/auroral-zone connection and to select intervals over the auroral zones for depletion-size calculations."}]}
